amount-to-be-transferred-is-greater-than: The quantity to be transferred %cantidad% is greater than the available quantity %cantidadlote% in the lot %numserie% of the variant %referencia% in the origin warehouse %codalmacen%
automatic-batch-serial-number-sales: Automatically select serial numbers in sales
cant-delete-lote-with-movs: Cannot delete a lot with movements
deleted-movement-no-document: Deleted movement %movement% due to the non-existence of document %document%
error-creating-a-new-batch-with-the-tran: Error creating a new batch with the transferred quantity %quantity% of variant %reference% in the destination warehouse %warehousecode%
error-when-adding-or-subtracting-the-qua: Error when adding or subtracting the quantity to the destination batch %serialnumber% of variant %reference% in the destination warehouse %warehousecode%
error-when-subtracting-the-quantity-from: Error when subtracting the quantity from the source lot %serialnumber% of variant %reference% in the source warehouse %warehousecode%
lot-was-not-found-in-the-source-warehous: The lot %numserie% of variant %referencia% was not found in the source warehouse %codalmacen%
modal-assign-numserie-desc: This option will forcibly assign a batch from the source warehouse to the line. Bypassing the line quantity restriction, this option only makes sense for old stock transfers; for stock transfers, use the line selector. Associating a batch will recalculate the total quantity of that batch.
traceability-no-stock-error: Products that do not control stock cannot have traceability
traceability-sale-wo-stock-error: Products with traceability do not allow sale without stock
trazabilidad-quantity-exceeded: You cannot register more quantity than the invoice has
